title: BadgerIQ FOCUS 1.2 export columns
description: The FinOps Open Cost & Usage Specification (FOCUS) 1.2 columns BadgerIQ populates on cost export, plus BadgerIQ-specific x_ai_* extension columns. Export is generated on demand from the ClickHouse spend_daily materialized view (per day x team x app x provider x model) — it is never persisted. SECURITY: no raw prompt/completion content is ever exported (CLAUDE.md rule 2); cost/usage/attribution dimensions only. Column order in this file is the canonical CSV column order.

columns.name: BillingAccountId
columns.description: FOCUS billing account — the BadgerIQ tenant.

columns.name: BillingPeriodStart
columns.description: Inclusive start of the billing window requested.

columns.name: BillingPeriodEnd
columns.description: Exclusive end of the billing window requested.

columns.name: ChargePeriodStart
columns.description: Inclusive start of the charge's day.

columns.name: ChargePeriodEnd
columns.description: Exclusive end of the charge's day.

columns.name: ChargeCategory
columns.description: FOCUS charge category; AI consumption is metered usage.

columns.name: BilledCost
columns.description: Cost billed for the period (BadgerIQ observed cost).

columns.name: EffectiveCost
columns.description: Amortized/effective cost; equals BilledCost for usage charges.

columns.name: ListCost
columns.description: List (undiscounted) cost; equals BilledCost absent negotiated rates.

columns.name: PublisherName
columns.description: Publisher of the consumed service (the model provider).

columns.name: ResourceId
columns.description: Resource accruing the charge — the consuming app.

columns.name: x_ai_calls
columns.description: Number of model calls in the period.
